title: I Know Whom I Have Believed

verses.text: I know not how this saving faith to me he did impart, nor how believing in his Word wrought peace within my heart. But "I know whom I have believed, and am persuaded that he is able to keep that which I've committed unto him against that day."

I know not what of good or ill may be reserved for me, of weary ways or golden days, before his face I see. But "I know whom I have believed, and am persuaded that he is able to keep that which I've committed unto him against that day."

I know not when my Lord may come, at night or noonday fair, nor if I'll walk the vale with him, or meet him in the air. But "I know whom I have believed, and am persuaded that he is able to keep that which I've committed unto him against that day."
